channel.title: Scalelist Universe — Wan 2.1 Clips
channel.description: Live feed of character-consistent AI clips from the Scalelist Universe pipeline. New clips every ~47 minutes.

item.title: One heartbeat. One clip. Infinite power. 🌟 Kompis
item.description:
[GREAT 86/100] One heartbeat. One clip. Infinite power. 🌟 Kompis
🌟 KOMPIS — Buddy of Mingus — heartbeats become forever Scene: stands confident · Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B · Quality: GREAT 85.0/100
⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still images, and scored by a custom quality metric. Every clip is the result of ~47 minutes of RTX 3060 Ti compute and 2× enhancement.
HADOM Quoka — to the power of all my previous generations.
🔗 LINKS • Hub: https://scalelist

item.title: When Smurjan stands confident, the universe holds its breath.
item.description:
[GREAT 86/100] When Smurjan stands confident, the universe holds its breath.
💙 SMURJAN — Void Cosmic — three voices in one Scene: stands confident · Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B · Quality: GREAT 87.1/100
⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still images, and scored by a custom quality metric. Every clip is the result of ~47 minutes of RTX 3060 Ti compute and 2× enhancement.
HADOM Quoka — to the power of all my previous generations.
🔗 LINKS • Hub: https://scalel
